@if(type() === 'sponsor') { @let images = userCard().images ?? []; @let imageFirst = images[0]; @let imageSecond = images[1]; @if (images.length > 1) {
} @else { @if (imageFirst) { } @if(imageSecond) { } } }

{{ userCard().name }}

@if(userCard().donationAmount) { } @if((userCard().links ?? []).length > 0) { @for (link of userCard().links; track link.label) { @if (link.type === 'github') { } @else if (link.type === 'youtube') { } @else if (link.type === 'other') { } } } @else { }
@if(userCard().subtitles.length > 0) {
@for (subtitle of userCard().subtitles; track subtitle) { {{ subtitle }} } @if(type() !== 'sponsor') { }
}
@if(userCard().subtitles.includes('Discord Booster')) { @if(userCard().boostDates?.length) {
@for (date of userCard().boostDates; track date; let index = $index) { Boost #{{ index + 1 }}: {{ date | date:'longDate' }} }
} }
